languages.text: "Все еретеки пытаются смутить разум праведника изощренными разговорами. С меня хватит, готовься к смерти!"
"All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"
languages.original_text: "Все еретеки пытаются смутить разум праведника изощренными разговорами. С меня хватит, готовься к смерти!"

traits.locale_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"
"All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"
"All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

languages.text: 「異端者は、正しき信者の心を複雑な言葉で惑わそうとする。もう我慢できない、死の準備をしろ！」
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: 「異端者は、正しき信者の心を複雑な言葉で惑わそうとする。もう我慢できない、死の準備をしろ！」

languages.text: «Los herejes intentan confundir las mentes de los creyentes con paparruchas confusas. No aguanto más, ¡prepárense a morir!».
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: «Los herejes intentan confundir las mentes de los creyentes con paparruchas confusas. No aguanto más, ¡prepárense a morir!».

languages.text: “异端都用这种弯弯绕绕的废话来扰乱正直信徒的心智。我听够了，受死吧！”
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: “异端都用这种弯弯绕绕的废话来扰乱正直信徒的心智。我听够了，受死吧！”

languages.text: "Alle Ketzer versuchen, den Verstand rechtschaffener Gläubiger mit wortreichem Geschwätz zu verwirren. Ich habe genug gehört. Bereitet Euch auf den Tod vor!"
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: "Alle Ketzer versuchen, den Verstand rechtschaffener Gläubiger mit wortreichem Geschwätz zu verwirren. Ich habe genug gehört. Bereitet Euch auf den Tod vor!"

languages.text: "Tüm kâfirler, karmaşık zırvalarla salih bir inananın zihnini bulandırmaya çalışır. Sabrım taştı, ölmeye hazırlan!"
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: "Tüm kâfirler, karmaşık zırvalarla salih bir inananın zihnini bulandırmaya çalışır. Sabrım taştı, ölmeye hazırlan!"

languages.text: « Tous les hérétiques tentent de corrompre l'esprit des croyants avec des propos alambiqués. J'en ai assez entendu, préparez-vous à mourir ! »
languages.original_text: "All heretics will try to confuse the mind of a righteous believer with convoluted blather. I've had enough, prepare to die!"

traits.locale_text: « Tous les hérétiques tentent de corrompre l'esprit des croyants avec des propos alambiqués. J'en ai assez entendu, préparez-vous à mourir ! »
